items.title: Kanye West's right to enter UK under review after festival outcry
items.dek: The rapper's appearance in London in July has caused controversy because of his past antisemitic comments.
items.body: The rapper's appearance in London in July has caused controversy because of his past antisemitic comments.

items.title: Farm Claims New $240,000 Kenworth Has Been in the Shop Almost 50 Times

items.title: Ten killed in Israeli strikes and clashes between Hamas and militia in Gaza, local sources say
items.dek: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.
items.body: The Israeli strikes reportedly targeted Hamas security personnel after they clashed with an Israeli-backed militia near Maghazi camp.
items.author: IriLine Desk
